name: User Story
about: A new feature or piece of work
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## User Story

**As a** [type of user]
**I want to** [action]
**So that** [benefit]

## Acceptance Criteria

Given [initial state]
When [action occurs]
Then [expected outcome]
And [additional outcomes]

## Technical Notes

[Implementation guidance, constraints, or references to relevant docs.
Link to ARCHITECTURE.md sections or STANDARDS.md sections where applicable.]

## Dependencies

[Any stories that must be completed before this one can start.
Leave blank if none.]

## Team

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] UX/Design

## Labels

- [ ] Team label (team-backend / team-ios / team-infrastructure / team-ux)
- [ ] Type label (feature / chore / bug / debt / spike)
- [ ] Concern labels if applicable (security / qa / devops / legal-blocked / ai-ml / design-required)
- [ ] Version label (v1 / v2 / v3 / v4)

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All acceptance criteria satisfied
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Coverage at or above 90% for changed code
- [ ] No new linting violations
- [ ] All public functions have docstrings/doc comments
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME without a GitHub issue number
- [ ] No commented-out code
- [ ] PR opened with clear description
- [ ] All PR conversations resolved
- [ ] CI pipeline green
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md updated if any architectural decision was made
- [ ] Security checklist completed (if security label)
- [ ] Claude Design handoff bundle approved (if iOS UI story)
- [ ] Legal prerequisites confirmed met (if legal-blocked label)
- [ ] Prompt evaluation suite passed (if ai-ml label)
